markdown:
# Opportunity Attack

You can make an Opportunity Attack when a creature that you can see leaves your reach using its action, its [[bonus_action]], its [[reaction]], or one of its speeds. To make the Opportunity Attack, take a [[reaction]] to make one melee attack with a weapon or an [[unarmed_strike]] against the provoking creature. The attack occurs right before the creature leaves your reach.
